todos.content: Add independent batch destination state (batchToChain, batchToToken, batchToCurrencies)
Wire batch tab to use batchToChain/batchToToken instead of shared toChain/toToken
Fix batch token detection - debug why only native tokens show (Alchemy fallback issue)
